About Mariana

Executive-level marketing and event leadership.

Mariana Nedic is a Miami-based marketing and experiential events leader with deep experience producing luxury brand activations, international campaigns, retail marketing initiatives, and large-scale consumer and B2B programs across the U.S., Europe, and North America.

Her background spans premium hospitality, food and wine, retail, trade associations, digital marketing, sponsorship coordination, and international business development.

Project Manager

Aroma360 • Miami

Integrated marketing initiatives across U.S. and UAE retail locations, supporting product launches, social campaigns, and in-store experiential programs.

Director of Event Operations

International Event & Exhibition Management • Miami

Scaled U.S. operations and produced high-volume experiential events, trade shows, educational programs, B2B networking, and luxury lifestyle activations.

Business Development & Hospitality Sales

Allin Interactive • Hilton Bentley South Beach

Generated enterprise partnerships and managed luxury hospitality accounts, group bookings, entertainment partnerships, and VIP event experiences.
